title: Crunchy Horchata Crunch Bars
description: A sweet and crunchy dessert bar recipe with a Mexican twist, featuring horchata flavors and crunchy texture.
instructions: Line an 8x8 inch baking dish with parchment paper.
In a large bowl, mix together crunchy granola, horchata cereal, and cranberry jam.
Press the mixture into the prepared baking dish.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until lightly golden.
Remove from the oven and stir in Mexican vanilla extract.
Let cool completely before cutting into bars.
Cut into 9-12 bars depending on desired size.
